last_session.value: Phase 03 completed 2026-07-14: Config-driven pipeline with 8 queries (python_jobs, cnc_jobs, elektrikar, spravce, udrzbar, zahradnik, truhlar, strechy), exclude lists, boolean AND/OR/NOT/parens AST, NFKD diacritics normalization, location+salary filters. Bazos params (hlokalita/humkreis) per-category. 76/76 unit tests. Full live test: 1037 ads/37.5s, ~60 matches. Comprehensive docs in data/COMPREHENSIVE_DOCS.md. Semantic diff analysis in data/SEMANTIC_DIFF.md.
